description: The page displays a loading animation with a plane flying between Brisbane and London while search results are being fetched.
frame_description: A loading screen for Webjet flight search showing 'Brisbane to London (Return)' with a red plane icon moving along a dotted arc.

description: The flight search results page finishes loading and displays the available flights, filters, and a price matrix.
frame_description: The search results page is now visible, featuring a grid of airline prices at the top and individual flight listings below.

description: The user scrolls down the page to view more flight results.
frame_description: The page content shifts upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the first flight result card from Virgin Australia.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the first flight result, specifically near the '2 more flight options' link.

description: The user clicks on the '2 more flight options' link to see alternative flights for the first result.
frame_description: The user activates the link, triggering an expansion of the flight card.

description: The flight result card expands to reveal additional flight options and details.
frame_description: The UI updates to show more flight times and prices within the first result's section.

description: The user scrolls further down the list of flight results.
frame_description: The user moves the page down to inspect more options.

description: The user hovers over various flight results, likely comparing prices and flight durations.
frame_description: The cursor moves across different flight cards as the user evaluates the options.

description: The user clicks the 'View Details' button on the first flight result.
frame_description: The user clicks the blue 'View Details' button on the right side of the flight card.

description: The flight details section opens or updates to show more specific information about the selected flight.
frame_description: The UI responds to the 'View Details' click by showing more granular flight info.

description: The user clicks the '2 more flight options' link again, likely to collapse the expanded view.
frame_description: The user clicks the link a second time.

description: The expanded flight options section collapses back to its original state.
frame_description: The additional flight options disappear, and the card returns to its compact view.

description: The user hovers over the airline price matrix at the top of the page, examining different airline options.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the grid of airline logos and prices, indicating the user is comparing overall costs across carriers.
